articles.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 with Improved Reasoning Capabilities
articles.summary: OpenAI's latest model demonstrates significant improvements in multi-step reasoning and coding tasks, surpassing previous benchmarks across math, science, and software engineering.

articles.title: Boston Dynamics' Atlas Robot Learns New Construction Tasks
articles.summary: The latest Atlas update enables the humanoid robot to perform complex construction workflows autonomously, including drywall installation and cable routing — tasks previously requiring human dexterity.

articles.title: Google DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 Expands to Drug Discovery
articles.summary: AlphaFold 3 now predicts interactions between proteins and small molecules with unprecedented accuracy, accelerating drug discovery pipelines at major pharmaceutical companies.

articles.title: NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs Power New Wave of Edge AI Deployments
articles.summary: NVIDIA's latest Blackwell architecture is enabling real-time AI inference at the edge, with deployments in manufacturing, healthcare diagnostics, and autonomous vehicle fleets.

articles.title: Waymo Expands Fully Autonomous Rides to 10 New Cities
articles.summary: Waymo's driverless taxi service is rolling out to 10 additional US cities in 2026, backed by improved sensor fusion and real-time mapping that handles complex urban environments.

articles.title: Microsoft Copilot Integrated into Azure DevOps Workflows
articles.summary: Microsoft's AI Copilot now automates PR reviews, generates test cases, and monitors production anomalies natively inside Azure DevOps, targeting enterprise engineering teams.
